prompt: Create a premium, highly realistic 1:1 campaign poster for DIMOND, a modern performance sneaker brand. Show one hero sneaker as the main focus in a dark studio with a glossy reflective floor, dramatic cinematic lighting, subtle motion energy, and a sleek athletic feel. Add bold, minimal typography with the brand name DIMOND and a short campaign headline. Make it feel like a real high-end sportswear ad, clean composition, sharp detail, realistic materials, modern and polished, cool dark tones with subtle metallic accents, no clutter, no collage.
